base: v39 browser voice selector with brute-force Dari/Farsi mobile candidates
notes: v40 tests language-tag-only speech as well as selected voice+tag combinations.
Includes fa-IR, fa-AF, fa, prs-AF, prs, fas, per, fa-Arab variants, plus last-resort manual modes.
If every candidate is silent on a phone, that browser/device exposes no usable Persian/Dari speech engine.
